message:
test(diff_strategy): add 42 edge-case tests for Bayesian strategy selector, Beta posterior, hysteresis (bd-2az7m)

Coverage: ChangeRateEstimator (all-unchanged/all-changed observations, rapid
decay, alternating observations, upper quantile extremes/tight posterior/clamping,
variance/mean formula verification), DiffStrategySelector (dirty_rows > height,
u16::MAX dimensions, selects without observe, conservative+zero dirty, uncertainty
guard+FullRedraw hysteresis, scan estimate zero cells, reset clears state),
normalization helpers (infinity inputs), cost model correctness (zero/full change
rate), config sanitization (all-NaN uses defaults, valid config preserved),
strategy evidence field completeness, determinism across 200 frames. Total: 106 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
